element.description: If you've ever wanted an animal, a town guard, or another creature to join you on your adventures, this month's Unearthed Arcana is for you. It gives you a straightforward way to turn a creature into your sidekick and have that companion level up with you.
element.name: Unearthed Arcana: Sidekicks

set.description: The content from this source is not included.
set.name: information
